summary: Typed Artifact Handoff is complete for the current view-layer product scope and has started Hermes Professional Phase 2 downstream gate-evidence hardening. The lane validates cross-artifact references, builds read-only provenance over Document -> EvidenceItem -> Issue/Risk -> DraftMemoSection -> ReviewComment -> GateResult -> AuditEvent -> EvalCase, consumes gate provenance plus persisted gate evidence IDs, surfaces missing/ambiguous references and unbacked gates as blockers, and exposes a readiness summary without creating a second persisted model.
contractsChanged: GateProvenance to TypedHandoffProvenance source ID folding
Persisted gate evidence to TypedHandoffProvenance audit/checkpoint ID folding
testsRun: cd frontend && npx eslint src/aletheia/agentops/handoff.ts tests/agentops/handoff.test.ts

cd frontend && rm -rf /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests && npx tsc -p tests/agentops/tsconfig.adapter.json && node --test /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/handoff.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/exportPackage.test.js (26 tests passed, 2026-07-10)

cd frontend && rm -rf /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests && npx tsc -p tests/agentops/tsconfig.adapter.json && node --test /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/anduParity.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/handoff.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/exportPackage.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/adapters.test.js /tmp/aletheia-adapter-tests/tests/agentops/skillsEval.test.js (33 tests passed, 2026-07-10)
cd backend && npm run check:aletheia:operator (ok true, dirty-worktree warning only, 2026-07-10)
risks: Claim and ObligationItem are not first-class AgentOps artifacts in this scope; the accepted current chain uses IssueNode/RiskItem plus ProfessionalSkill/playbook provenance.
TypedHandoffProvenance is view-only evidence for reviewers/export builders; it is not persisted approval, not a migration, and not a replacement for Aletheia source records.
Persisted gate evidence IDs are folded into matching handoff provenance only when supplied by export/gate provenance inputs; the handoff layer does not authorize final export by itself.
Backend/audit owners still need to decide where first-class persisted gate audit events and durable handoff records live if this view-layer evidence becomes persisted product state.
needs: Next Phase 2 slice should carry persisted gate evidence IDs into eval snapshot provenance.
Future persistence work should map TypedHandoffProvenance and TypedHandoffReadiness outputs to existing Aletheia source records before treating them as durable audit state.
